business_question: Which suppliers contribute most to late deliveries?
business_context: Supply chain managers want to identify vendors causing fulfillment delays and impacting inventory availability.

aggregation_logic.Supplier OTIF Rate: on-time deliveries divided by total deliveries

sql_answer:
SELECT
    SUPPLIER_ID,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_DELIVERIES,
    AVG(DELAY_DAYS) AS AVG_DELAY_DAYS
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SUPPLIER_DELIVERY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY AVG_DELAY_DAYS DESC;
